title: Error: Dimension information for Object Entity.Model is missing
breadcrumbs: Error: Dimension information for Object  Entity.Model is missing
text: Error: Dimension information for Object Entity.Model is missing This message is generated by the Migration Utility when the component contains entity or printer frames for which the dimension information is missing. Problem The problem is most likely to occur with old components that have not been edited using the graphical layout editor. Resolution In Uniface 9, open the component, click an element in the layout, then save the component. Migrate it again. Entity Frame with Missing Dimensions === MIGRATION ERROR [cpt:MYCOMPONENT] === Failed to migrate cpt:MYCOMPONENT. Object will be removed from the repository. ErrorID: -100001 Error : Dimension information for ent MYENT.MYNAMESPACE is missing Context information: [context] [entity] = "MYENT.MYNAMESPACE" Removed cpt:MYCOMPONENT from repository Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
